content: I’ll start by reading the page with `get_accessibility_tree` using the `visible` filter so I can see the cookie banner and identify its close button (usually labeled “Dismiss” or “Close”). Once I locate that button—either by its stable `ref_id` (e.g., `ref_XX`) or by its text—I’ll click it with `click_ax` (or fall back to `click` if the ref_id isn’t available). Clicking the close button should dismiss the cookie banner. After the click I can verify the banner is gone by taking a screenshot.
